fields.label: Video controllers
fields.collector: Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_VideoController -ErrorAction Stop | Select-Object Name, AdapterRAM, AdapterDACType, DriverVersion, VideoModeDescription, CurrentHorizontalResolution, CurrentVerticalResolution, PNPDeviceID

column.name: VideoControllers
column.description: Display adapters as a JSON array (name, adapter RAM, DAC type, driver version, resolution) from Win32_VideoController.
